user_system_path: prove Slack test-mode Right Now card and button state update from stored workday state
allowed_files_raw: Issue #131 only: Slack test-mode Right Now card, Workday Presence state/action, deterministic presence-loop receipt, and directly scoped proof files.
forbidden_files_raw: No landing work, Stripe, dashboard redesign, Supabase schema, live Slack install/OAuth/send, Teams/email/calendar expansion, outreach, billing/downgrade work, or broad cleanup.
required_browser_proof: Not applicable for this backend/test-mode seam; issue #131 implementation proof uses focused Slack test-mode route and presence-loop receipt tests.
acceptance_condition: One complete Slack test-mode MVP Presence Loop is proven: stored workday state -> generated Right Now card -> simulated button action -> updated workday state -> deterministic receipt, with no live Slack send and no paid model call.
stop_condition: Stop when one issue #131 implementation PR is open, required proof passes, and a GitHub receipt is posted.
browser_proof_command: not applicable - Slack test-mode route and deterministic receipt tests cover this seam
anti_regression_checks: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md names issue #131 as the only active implementation seam
Focused tests prove Right Now card payload generation from stored workday state
Focused tests prove Done, Stuck, Break smaller, and Snooze state transitions
Presence-loop receipt shows before state, card payload, button action, and after state
Receipt marks paid_model_call_required false and inline_full_state_recompute false
Forbidden scope keeps out landing, Stripe, dashboard redesign, Supabase schema, live Slack install/OAuth/send, Teams/email/calendar expansion, outreach, billing/downgrade work, and broad cleanup
No live Slack OAuth/install/send code is added
next_command: Open the issue #131 implementation PR after focused presence-loop tests, gate:command, gate:continuity, lint, and build pass. Do not start landing, live Slack, Stripe, dashboard redesign, Supabase schema, billing/downgrade, outreach, or broad cleanup.
